basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website gsssb.gujarat.gov.in. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the GSSSB Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per rules, with relaxations for reserved categories.
age_limit.details: Age limits are as per rules, with relaxations for reserved categories. | Women (General Category): 5 years relaxation Men (Reserved Category): 5 years relaxation Women (Reserved Category): 10 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Men (General Category, Disabled): 10 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Women (General Category, Disabled): 15 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Men (Reserved Category, Disabled): 15 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Women (Reserved Category, Disabled): 20 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Ex-Servicemen: 3 years plus service period relaxation

qualification.details: Diploma in Horticulture obtained from a Polytechnic of any of the Agriculture /Horticulture Universities incorporated or established by or under the Central Agriculture /Horticulture Universities Act or State Agriculture /Horticulture Universities Act in India Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 40,800/- (Fixed) for 5 years, then Level-5 (Rs. 29,200 - Rs. 92,300)
salary_details.details: Fixed pay of Rs. 40,800/- for the first five years. After five years, regular pay scale of Rs. 29,200/- to Rs. 92,300/- (Level-5) as per the 7th Pay Commission.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GSSSB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Diploma in Horticulture obtained from a Polytechnic of any of the Agriculture /Horticulture Universities incorporated or established by or under the Central Agriculture /Horticulture Universities Act or State Agriculture /Horticulture Universities Act in India Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both

rows.category: Reserved Categories (Women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, Ex-Servicemen)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limits are as per rules, with relaxations for reserved categories. Women (General Category): 5 years relaxation Men (Reserved Category): 5 years relaxation Women (Reserved Category): 10 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Men (General Category, Disabled): 10 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Women (General Category, Disabled): 15 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Men (Reserved Category, Disabled): 15 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Women (Reserved Category, Disabled): 20 years relaxation (Max 45 years) Ex-Servicemen: 3 years plus service period relaxation

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Fixed pay of Rs. 40,800/- for the first five years. After five years, regular pay scale of Rs. 29,200/- to Rs. 92,300/- (Level-5) as per the 7th Pay Commission.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer recruitment is 21 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Agriculture Overseer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Agriculture Overseer, Class-3 posts under the GSSSB recruitment drive. These vacancies are distributed across various categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for Agriculture Overseer?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Horticulture from a recognized Agriculture/Horticulture University. Additionally, basic computer knowledge and proficiency in Gujarati or Hindi are essential for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for GSSSB Agriculture Overseer?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for Unreserved categories and Rs. 400/- for Reserved Categories (Women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, Ex-Servicemen). Fees must be paid online by the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Agriculture Overseer?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed pay of Rs. 40,800/- for the first five years. After this period, the salary will be as per the regular pay scale of Rs. 29,200/- to Rs. 92,300/- (Level-5).

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Agriculture Overseer post is as per GSSSB rules. Age relaxations are applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories, women, and persons with disabilities as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GSSSB Agriculture Overseer?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Agriculture Overseer post involves a Competitive Examination, which includes Part-A and Part-B. Candidates who qualify in the examination will proceed to the Document Verification stage.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer post?
faq.answer: You can apply online by visiting the official website ojas.gujarat.gov.in. Navigate to the GSSSB section, find the advertisement for Agriculture Overseer, and follow the instructions to fill out and submit the application form.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website to apply?
faq.answer: The official website for applying to the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer recruitment is https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in. All applications must be submitted through this portal within the specified application period.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are provided for various reserved categories, including women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, Disabled candidates, and Ex-Servicemen, as per the rules of the Gujarat government. Specific details are in the official notification.
